title: bidens mathewsii
intro: Bidens mathewsii, also known as the slender beggar's lice, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds. The health benefits of Bidens mathewsii include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Bidens mathewsii can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as infusions, decoctions, and topical applications, which can be used to soothe skin irritations and treat various health conditions.
